visual_description: A man in a beige suit and glasses sits at a desk, holding a small object in his hands. In the background, another man in a light-colored shirt and dark pants stands near a doorway, partially obscured. A close-up shot shows a gold wristwatch with a white face and black hands.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable sigh at the beginning.
